## Tags
steam, warmth, temperature, burn, hot, boiling, heat, smoke, vapor, smell, aroma, sauna

## Categories
weather, sustainability

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/waves-vertical)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::WavesVertical;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        WavesVertical { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
